---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# series-melancholia

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

[Melancholia](https://art.djnavarro.net/gallery/melancholia/) is an art repository by Danielle Navarro. The images in this repository are released under a [CC-BY-4.0](./LICENSE.md). The code is not currently not free to use (this may change).
